# Gas Pro Inspectors

> Gas Pro Inspectors provides NYC Local Law 152 gas piping inspections,
> GPS-1 and GPS-2 DOB filings, and compliance support for building owners
> across all five NYC boroughs. Licensed Master Plumber. A division of
> Environmental Safeguard Solutions LLC.

## Services
- [Local Law 152 Gas Piping Inspection](https://gasproinspectors.com/)
- [GPS-1 & GPS-2 DOB Filing](https://gasproinspectors.com/)
- [Compliance & Deficiency Support](https://gasproinspectors.com/)
- [CityWatch Violation Monitoring](https://citywatch.ess-nyc.com/)

## Service Area
- Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island (all NYC boroughs)

## Key Facts
- Buildings with gas piping must be inspected every 4 years per NYC Local Law 152
- Non-compliance penalties: up to $10,000 per year
- 2026 deadlines apply to Community Districts 4, 6, 8, 9, and 16
- GPS-1 report documents the inspection findings
- GPS-2 certification must be filed with DOB within 60 days of inspection
- Deficiencies must be corrected within 120 days
- Inspections performed by NYC Licensed Master Plumber as required by law
